03 playground

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)

plotting estims

setup

implicit_data <- read_csv('../data/iat.csv') |>
  mutate(pairing = factor(pairing, levels = c('Unassociated', 'Associated')))
implicit_full_lmm <- lmer(
  logRT ~ pairing + 
    (1 + pairing | ppt_id) + 
    (1 + pairing | item_id),
  data = implicit_data
)
summary(implicit_full_lmm)

Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method ['lmerModLmerTest']
Formula: logRT ~ pairing + (1 + pairing | ppt_id) + (1 + pairing | item_id)
   Data: implicit_data

REML criterion at convergence: 10722.4

Scaled residuals: 
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-3.7647 -0.6693 -0.0054  0.6657  3.4009 

Random effects:
 Groups   Name              Variance Std.Dev. Corr 
 ppt_id   (Intercept)       0.60681  0.7790        
          pairingAssociated 0.09856  0.3139   -0.83
 item_id  (Intercept)       0.77585  0.8808        
          pairingAssociated 0.15081  0.3883   -0.77
 Residual                   0.27297  0.5225        
Number of obs: 6400, groups:  ppt_id, 100; item_id, 32

Fixed effects:
                  Estimate Std. Error       df t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)        4.77126    0.17435 47.43869  27.366  < 2e-16 ***
pairingAssociated -0.76237    0.07661 44.00192  -9.951 7.76e-13 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
            (Intr)
parngAssctd -0.776

plot fixef

library(effects)

effect(term = "pairing", mod = implicit_full_lmm) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = pairing, y = fit)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0) +
  geom_line(aes(group = 1))

plot ranef lines

We could do it by ppt or by item, depending on the story we want to tell … or both, with lines coloured by ppt? one line per ppt/item pair?

RESUME

library(broom.mixed)

augment(implicit_full_lmm)

identifying possible ranefs

  • y ~ x + z (1 + x | g) sth where only one pred not both have rd slps
  • y ~ x * z (1 + x * z | g) + (1 | h) sth w two groups
